title: Maven 3 / 4 / 5 with Robert Scholte
summary: Maven is one of the cornerstones of the Java ecosystem - here I talk with Robert Scholte, Chairman of the Apache Maven projects
content:
Maven is one of the cornerstones of the Java ecosystem - here I talk with Robert Scholte, Chairman of the Apache Maven projects

Everybody knows Maven, but few people know the developers behind it and what they plan for Java's most used build tool. I talk with Robert Scholte and he gives a glimpse of the project's inner workings as well as some ideas for Maven 4 and even 5.

  • Recorded at JokerConf 2018
  • Robert on Twitter
  • Maven issues to get you started
  • Snyk JVM Ecosystem Report 2018

Watch the video.
